name: AbLang-MPNN
description: Hybrid antibody sequence design combining AbLang and ProteinMPNN. Generate antibody-like sequences with improved binding properties. Keep heavy and light chains to <150 residues, performance will be significantly degraded above this limit.
capabilities: Hybrid antibody sequence design combining AbLang and ProteinMPNN
Generate antibody-like sequences with improved binding properties
Keep heavy and light chains to <150 residues, performance will be significantly degraded above this limit

pdbFile.description: Antibody structure in PDB format. Heavy and light chains should be <150 residues each.

heavyChainId.description: Chain ID of the antibody heavy chain

lightChainId.description: Chain ID of the antibody light chain

temperature.description: Sampling temperature controlling sequence diversity. Higher values generate more diverse sequences.
